Bash(cd "/c/Users/eddie/Claude Projects/Promotley-V2" && python3 -c "
content = open\('src/lib/planConfig.ts', 'rb'\).read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
old = ' * Single source of truth for AI model mappings and credit policies\\n */'
new = ' * Single source of truth for AI model mappings and credit policies\\n *\\n * IMPORTANT: Credit values \(50/100/200\) are duplicated in\\n * supabase/functions/stripe-webhook -- update both when changing.\\n */'
result = content.replace\(old, new, 1\)
if result == content:
    print\('NO CHANGE - pattern not found'\)
else:
    open\('src/lib/planConfig.ts', 'wb'\).write\(result.encode\('utf-8'\)\)

")
